{"session_id":"75d29ba3-26c2-421b-a165-dc09870e4e9e","transcript_path":"/home/mcrowe/.claude/projects/-home-mcrowe/75d29ba3-26c2-421b-a165-dc09870e4e9e.jsonl","cwd":"/home/mcrowe","permission_mode":"bypassPermissions","hook_event_name":"Stop","stop_hook_active":false,"last_assistant_message":"`voxtype-vulkan` binary now requires AVX-512. Your CPU lacks it. Binary worked before → voxtype updated and new vulkan binary added AVX-512 requirement.

**Fix:** switch ExecStart to avx2 (loses GPU, keeps working):

```bash
sudo nano /home/mcrowe/.config/systemd/user/voxtype.service
```

Change line:
```
ExecStart=/usr/lib/voxtype/voxtype-vulkan daemon
```
→
```
ExecStart=/usr/lib/voxtype/voxtype-avx2 daemon
```

Then:
```bash
systemctl --user daemon-reload && systemctl --user restart voxtype
```

**Alternative:** check if onnx-cuda variant works (GTX 1050 is CUDA 12):

```bash
systemctl --user stop voxtype
/usr/lib/voxtype/voxtype-onnx-cuda-12 daemon 2>&1 | head -20
```

If that starts cleanly → use onnx-cuda-12 in ExecStart instead (GPU stays)."}

stdin_parsed.last_assistant_message:
`voxtype-vulkan` binary now requires AVX-512. Your CPU lacks it. Binary worked before → voxtype updated and new vulkan binary added AVX-512 requirement.

**Fix:** switch ExecStart to avx2 (loses GPU, keeps working):

```bash
sudo nano /home/mcrowe/.config/systemd/user/voxtype.service
```

Change line:
```
ExecStart=/usr/lib/voxtype/voxtype-vulkan daemon
```
→
```
ExecStart=/usr/lib/voxtype/voxtype-avx2 daemon
```

Then:
```bash
systemctl --user daemon-reload && systemctl --user restart voxtype
```

**Alternative:** check if onnx-cuda variant works (GTX 1050 is CUDA 12):

```bash
systemctl --user stop voxtype
/usr/lib/voxtype/voxtype-onnx-cuda-12 daemon 2>&1 | head -20
```

If that starts cleanly → use onnx-cuda-12 in ExecStart instead (GPU stays).
